[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style illustration shows a young girl with large red eyes looking toward the viewer while her arm extends forward in the foreground.  

Main Subject:  
The main focus is a stylized character’s face and upper body: she has medium-length dark brown hair with bangs and strands falling to one side, large red eyes with dark pupils, and an open mouth. Her expression appears surprised or curious, and her head is angled slightly as she looks outward. One arm is raised and extended toward the viewer, with the hand partially visible at the lower left of the image. She wears a dark choker-like collar and a light-colored top or undershirt, with layered clothing in dark and red tones around the neck and chest area.  

Setting:  
The background is minimal and indistinct, resembling an indoor or flat, softly colored space with warm beige and muted tones. No clear time of day, weather, or specific location is visible.  

Visual Details:  
The image uses warm, soft shading and bold outlines typical of anime art. The lighting feels even and warm, with highlights on the character’s face and hair. Colors include beige/tan in the background, dark brown hair, red eyes, dark clothing around the neck, and red and yellow accents in the garment. The camera angle is close and slightly tilted, emphasizing the character’s face and the extended arm in the foreground. The composition crops the character from the shoulders upward, with the head and outstretched arm occupying most of the frame.  

Visible Text:  
No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary:  
It shows an anime-style girl’s close-up face and torso with red eyes, an open mouth, and her arm extended toward the viewer. The background is plain and warm-toned, keeping attention on the character’s expression and clothing details.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
